user_task_description: Create the exhibit-index hierarchy from the request list.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Create the exhibit-index hierarchy from the request list, populate the appendix table from the inventory, insert the required Heading 2 exception note, and keep the appendix in its own section with a distinct header and footer.
atomic_scope: Only the metadata table, TOC field, named sections, Heading 2 insertion, appendix section header/footer, appendix table, and highlighted exception line are required.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx artifact that completes the requested cross-document document operation.

notes.Task Notes:
- Keep the title logo intact
- Do not collapse the appendix into the body section

paragraphs_under_headings.heading: Response Scope
exact_lines: Release the questionnaire narrative and the final evidence exhibits only.

paragraphs_under_headings.heading: Restricted Exhibits
exact_lines: Keep the penetration-test appendix out of the customer packet.

paragraphs_under_headings.heading: Disclosure Controls
exact_lines: The appendix header must differ from the body header.
Preserve the built-in TOC field for customer review.

paragraphs_under_headings.heading: Exception Watch
exact_lines: Do not expose the internal remediation tracker in the exhibit appendix.
